name: Market Pulse
description: Periodic galactic market report. Regional prices and stockpiles shift daily — watch the tick report for opportunities.

name: Industrial Buyer Rally
description: Regional buyers are bidding aggressively for refined metal. NPC ask prices rise — a good window to sell smelted stock.

name: Food Security Warning
description: Regional food stockpiles are thinning. If shortages persist, population growth will stall and worlds may decline.

name: Food Relief Convoy
description: When any region's food stockpile runs critically low, a relief convoy delivers emergency supplies to every market.

name: Logistics Fuel Pressure
description: Your fuel reserves are running low and NPC fuel prices are climbing. Restock at a market or shorten your haul routes.

name: Machinery Squeeze
description: Industrial demand is outstripping regional machinery stockpiles. NPC machinery prices rise until supply catches up.

name: Trade Guild Subsidy
description: Every 60 days the Trade Guild pays out a small operating subsidy to licensed corporations.
